title: E76.5: Food shortage, China's grand plan, inflation, French election plus an All-In Summit preview
description:
*** PRODUCER'S NOTE: This is part two of E76. If you want to hear the besties break down Elon vs. Twitter, check out the previous episode.
 
 
0:00 Surprise part two!

1:03 Friedberg breaks down the global food crisis and predicts China's grand plan

9:27 Inflation: 8.5% CPI in March, potential causes, what the rest of 2022 might look like

18:22 Understanding French election results so far

23:08 All-In Summit update and preview

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the global food crisis, China's grand plan, inflation, and the French election. They also provide an update and preview of the All-In Summit. The hosts analyze the potential causes of inflation and its impact on the global economy. Additionally, they break down the French election results and what they might mean for the future.

takeaways.text: Global food crisis is a major concern
China's grand plan involves securing food supplies
Inflation is at 8.5% CPI in March
French election results have significant implications
All-In Summit will feature notable speakers and discussions
Inflation may continue to rise in 2022
China's non-intervention principle is being reevaluated

quotes.text: Food crisis is a major concern
quotes.speaker: David Friedberg

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern about the global food crisis and inflation, but also provide some optimism about the All-In Summit and potential solutions to these issues.

notable_moments.description: Surprise part two of the episode
